task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the camera specifications document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/camera_specs.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a mission containing Takeoff, Survey, and Return to Launch items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl (QGC) Plan view is open, and the mission item list shows 'Takeoff', 'Survey', and 'Return to Launch' (or 'RTL').

task_completion.description: Agent defines a survey polygon over the green field north of the home position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGC map displays a survey polygon with at least 4 vertices covering the green field area located north of the 'H' (Home) icon.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the custom camera specifications in the Survey settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Survey settings panel in QGC shows 'Custom Camera' selected with Sensor Width: 13.2, Sensor Height: 8.8, Image Width: 5472, Image Height: 3648, and Focal Length: 12.0.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the flight altitude and overlap percentages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Survey settings panel in QGC shows Altitude set to 120m, Frontal Overlap set to 80%, and Side Overlap set to 75%.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the completed mission plan to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in QGC or a file manager window showing the file 'multispectral_survey.plan' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl graphical interface to create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QGroundControl application window, rather than just a text editor writing JSON/plan data.

integrity.description: Agent manually drew or generated the survey pattern on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map view shows the interactive vertex handles of the survey polygon and the generated green flight path lines inside the polygon.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy a pre-existing solution file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the step-by-step creation and configuration of the mission in the GUI before saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Camera Specs in QGC: Sensor Width: 13.2mm, Sensor Height: 8.8mm, Image Width: 5472px, Image Height: 3648px, Focal Length: 12.0mm. Expected Flight Parameters: Altitude: 120m, Frontal Overlap: 80%, Side Overlap: 75%. The final mission plan must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/multispectral_survey.plan.
